questions.text: In which year was James Cameron's blockbuster 'Titanic' released?
Which actor played the lead role of Neo in 'The Matrix' trilogy?
What is the name of the fictional African nation in 'Black Panther'?
Which movie made history in 2020 by becoming the first non-English language film to win the Oscar for Best Picture?
Which famous director is known for 'Pulp Fiction', 'Kill Bill', and 'Inglourious Basterds'?
What was the world's first full-length animated feature film, released by Disney in 1937?
options: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
questions.answer: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.text: Who won a posthumous Academy Award for Best Supporting Actor for his role as the Joker in 'The Dark Knight'?
In 'The Lord of the Rings', what was Gollum's original hobbit-like name before being corrupted by the Ring?
Which 1975 Steven Spielberg film is widely credited with creating the concept of the summer blockbuster?
options: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
